scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./apps/**" --filter "./packages/**" --filter "./database" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
scripts.docker:up: docker compose -f docker/compose.yml -f docker/compose.override.yml --env-file docker/.env up -d --build
scripts.docker:ps: docker compose -f docker/compose.yml -f docker/compose.override.yml --env-file docker/.env ps
scripts.docker:down: docker compose -f docker/compose.yml -f docker/compose.override.yml --env-file docker/.env down
scripts.docker:logs: docker compose -f docker/compose.yml -f docker/compose.override.yml --env-file docker/.env logs -f
scripts.docker:observability: docker compose -f docker/compose.yml -f docker/compose.override.yml -f docker/compose.observability.yml --env-file docker/.env up -d
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @medease/queue run test && pnpm --filter @medease/auth run test
